chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P No. D - 145 of 2023 Date order with Signature of Hon’ble Judge Hearing of case (Priority) 1. For orders on office objection at flag ‘A’ 2. For hearing of CMA No.703/2023 (S/A) 3. For hearing of main case 23.08.2023 Mr. Ali Dad Narejo, Advocate for the Petitioner Mr. Zulfiqar Ali Naich, Assistant Advocate General Sindh >>>>>..<<<<< After arguing the matter at some length, learned counsel for the petitioner does not press this petition as the petitioner is a Civil Servant and seeks permission to file a representation challenging the seniority list before the competent authority. Muhammad Aslam Lashari, Superintending Engineer, Education Works Department, Sukkur is present and submits that if any representation is filed by the petitioner challenging seniority list, it will be decided in accordance with law, preferably within a period of two months. The petition is disposed of as not pressed in the above terms. Judge Judge ARBROHI
